consentText: This assistant may collect contact information you choose to share so Dial Auto Group staff can follow up.

branding.welcomeMessage: Welcome to Dial Auto Group. Which dealership are you interested in — Jeep, Nissan, Chevy, INFINITI, or CDJR?
branding.disclaimerText: Vehicle availability, pricing, incentives, and dealership information are provided only when verified. Store preference can be saved for staff follow-up.
branding.escalationMessage: I can save your request and preferred dealership for staff to review. I will not claim a transfer unless a verified handoff succeeds.
